title: Lightweight DI Container
description: Implement a 'Container' class with 'register(key, provider)' and 'get(key)'. Providers should be instantiated once (Lazy Singleton).
test_script:
import unittest
from di import Container
class TestDI(unittest.TestCase):
    def test_inject(self):
        c = Container()
        c.register('db', lambda: object())
        self.assertIs(c.get('db'), c.get('db'))
